title: Accusé de réception kényan de l'instrument d'approbation français

pages.text:
Telephone: +254-20-318888

Fax: +254-20-240066/341953/344333

E-mail communication@mfa.go.ke

Website: www.mfa.go.kc

When replying please quote Ref. No, and date

MECO

BE سن

he MAT

HARAMBEE AVENUE

P.O. Box 30551-00100

NAIROBI, KENYA

N6 7

MINISTRY OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS

Ref. NMFA. TRA 18/8

ARRIVEE

15 JUL 2009

AMBASSADE DE FRANCE

The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Kenya presents its compliments to the Embassy of France in Kenya and has the honour to acknowledge receipt of the Embassy's note no. 274 of 23rd June, 2009, forwarding a letter from Mr. Bernard Kouchner, French Minister for

Foreign and European Affairs, and wishes to inform as follows:

The Ministry of Foreign Affairs notes that the letter constitutes the instrument of approval, by the provision of article 14, of the Agreement between the French Government and the Government of the Republic of

Kenya on the reciprocal promotion and protection of investments, signed on 4th December, 2007, in Nairobi.

The Ministry further informs that a response to the letter from the

French Minister for Foreign and European Affairs will follow in due course.

The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Kenya avails itself of this opportunity to renew to the Embassy of France in Kenya the assurances of its highest consideration.

Nairobi, 13th July, 2009

EMBASSY OF FRANCE IN KENYA

NAIROBI

NAIROBI
